title: The Flick
author: Annie Baker
description: "In a run-down movie theater in central Massachusetts, three underpaid employees mop the floors and attend to one of the last 35 millimeter film projectors in the state. Their tiny battles and not-so-tiny heartbreaks play out in the empty aisles, becoming more gripping than the lackluster second-run movies on screen ..."--Provided by publisher.
subjects: American drama (dramatic works by one author)
